label: Gaza Deaths Since Oct 7
source: Gaza Ministry of Health / UNRWA / UN OCHA
contestNote: Gaza Ministry of Health: 72,317 killed as of April 10, 2026 — the 6-month ceasefire anniversary. 738 Palestinians killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire (avg. 4+/day); Israel bombed Gaza on 36 of the last 40 days. Independent peer-reviewed study (Feb 21, 2026) cross-verified 75,227+ killed. True toll with indirect deaths and those under rubble may exceed 90,000–100,000. WHO medical evacuations remain suspended since April 7 after driver killed; 18,000+ patients awaiting evacuation. Phase 2 talks deadlocked.
delta: 738 killed since Oct 2025 ceasefire; 6-month anniversary Apr 10; WHO evacuations suspended

label: Israelis Killed (Oct 7 Attack)
contestNote: IDF-confirmed figure; Hamas has not disputed the overall casualty scale.
delta: Deadliest day for Jews since the Holocaust

label: Hostages Remaining in Gaza
source: Israeli PM Office / Hostages Families Forum / UN Security Council
contestNote: The body of Ran Gvili, the last Israeli hostage, was returned to Israel in early 2026, prompting the UN Security Council to convene. All 251 taken Oct 7 are now dead, released, or accounted for.
delta: Down from 251 taken Oct 7; last remains returned early 2026

label: Displaced People in Gaza
contestNote: ~90% of Gaza's population displaced at peak. Oct 2025 ceasefire has allowed some internal movement but reconstruction is years away; displacement remains critical.
delta: Most displaced since 1948; 81% of all structures damaged

label: Israeli Settlers in West Bank
contestNote: Figure includes East Jerusalem. UN OHCHR March 2026 report documented approval of 36,973 housing units in East Jerusalem settlements and ~27,200 in rest of West Bank in 12-month period. 84 new outposts established. Settler attacks have surged dramatically since Feb 28 Iran war — 257 incidents in first 25 days.

label: IDF Soldiers Killed (Gaza War)
delta: As of Mar 2026; ceasefire since Oct 10, 2025 reduced combat deaths

label: UNSC Resolutions on Palestine
contestNote: Includes all UNSC resolutions relating to Arab-Israeli / Israeli-Palestinian conflict since 1948. UNSC Resolution 2803 (Nov 2025) endorsed Trump ceasefire plan. UNSC Palestine briefing held March 26, 2026.

label: Registered Palestinian Refugees
contestNote: UNRWA counts descendants of 1948 refugees; Israel argues definition is uniquely broad. Israel banned UNRWA from Israeli territory (Jan 2025). 391 UNRWA staff killed in Gaza war. UNRWA 2026 Flash Appeal seeks $4B; agency down to half a dozen clinics in Gaza.

label: Active ICC Arrest Warrants
contestNote: Warrants for Netanyahu and Gallant remain active. Deif warrant cancelled Feb 2025 after Hamas confirmed his death. US imposed sanctions on ICC prosecutor Karim Khan and 9 judges (Feb 2025). Draft warrants for Ben-Gvir and Smotrich reportedly prepared but not yet filed.
delta: Warrants under US sanctions pressure; Netanyahu international travel curtailed

label: West Bank Palestinians Killed (Since Oct 7 2023)
contestNote: Includes deaths from IDF operations and settler violence. 22,000+ arrested. UN OHCHR March 2026 report documented 36,000+ Palestinians forcibly displaced in West Bank. Three killed on March 30 (Land Day 50th anniversary). Two more killed April 1 by IDF snipers after alleged rock-throwing. 32+ killed in West Bank in 2026. West Bank general strike and mass protests on April 1 against Israel's new death penalty law (passed March 30). 2026 settler violence pace continues to surpass 2025 record; 1,500+ Palestinians displaced by settler attacks since Jan 1.
delta: +2 on April 1; deadliest West Bank period since Second Intifada
